title: Mildly Spicy Thai Chicken Curry
description: A briny and silky Thai dish featuring cocoa powder and pickle, this crowd-pleaser is low-carb-friendly and perfect for dinner parties.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the curry paste to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Stir in the cocoa powder, fish sauce, and pickle juice, and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 5 minutes.
